response.overview: A romantic comedy drama, SUMMER RAIN follows three girls living together through their last summer in Brighton - Britain's sexy, funky, coastal capital. On her 21st birthday, Michelle decides that it is time to 'grow up' & dumps her long term boyfriend Gary, but he will do anything to win her back! Vicky & Becky try to help Michelle face the future only to question theirs - just how do you move on & grow up? A film for twenty-somethings everywhere.
response.tagline: A tale of sex, chocolate & ice-cream
response.title: Summer Rain
